rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §25.155 governs school district policies on voluntary student religious expression. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 25.155. ADOPTION OF POLICY. A school district shall adopt and implement a local policy regarding a limited public forum and voluntary student expression of religious viewpoints.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict detected.
